hero.title: About Us
hero.subtitle: Learn the story behind Mas Cerca Ap and our commitment to freshness and quality.

history.title: Our Story
history.text: Más Cerca AP is not just a business — it is a gift from God, and living proof that new beginnings are possible. It was founded by a couple who believed that serving people was the best way to build something. We produce and sell fruit juices, fruit pulps and fresh products sourced directly from farms, buying from farmers at their land and serving as the platform that brings their products to homes, businesses and new markets. We are driven by faith in God, guided by honesty and defined by our commitment to the Colombian countryside.

timeline.title: From Farm to Table
timeline.subtitle: Our artisanal process guarantees maximum freshness and quality in every juice we produce.

steps.title: Growing
steps.description: We select the finest fruits from local suppliers in Cundinamarca.

steps.title: Selection
steps.description: We inspect every fruit to guarantee only the best quality.

steps.title: Washing
steps.description: Deep cleaning with purified water for maximum hygiene.

steps.title: Pressing
steps.description: Cold pressing to preserve vitamins and nutrients.

steps.title: Delivery
steps.description: Distribution across Bogota in under 24 hours.

mission.label: Mission
mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: We are Mas Cerca AP, a company driven by our love for service and the conviction that every person deserves access to fresh, natural, high-quality products. We directly connect Colombian farmers with homes, businesses and new markets, serving as the bridge that brings the countryside to the table and small producers to great opportunities. We act with honesty, commitment, and a vocation for service as the foundation of every decision we make.

vision.label: Vision
vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: In the short and medium term, Mas Cerca AP will become ever more true to its name: a company that keeps bringing the countryside closer to the world, producers to new markets and Colombian products to new frontiers. We will grow as the platform that drives the growth of others, being the most reliable and efficient bridge between rural wealth and urban markets, faithful to our purpose: to serve with love, honesty and faith in God as our foundation.

items.title: Faith & Commitment
items.description: Everything we are is born from our love for God and people.

items.title: Genuine Service
items.description: Serving people isn't just what we do — it's why we exist.

items.title: Quality
items.description: Quality at Mas Cerca AP doesn't come from a certification but from the conviction that people deserve the best.

items.title: Social Impact
items.description: Growing is good. Growing while driving the growth of others is better.

gallery.title: Our Process in Images
gallery.subtitle: A behind-the-scenes look at how we prepare every juice.
gallery.mobileHint: Tap each image to learn about the process

cards.title: The origin is everything
cards.body: We rise early with the farmer to choose only the fruit at its exact peak of ripeness. There are no shortcuts in the field — and we don't take any either.

cards.title: We buy at the farm
cards.body: No middlemen. The Colombian farmer deserves a fair price and you deserve to know exactly where what you drink comes from.

cards.title: Every fruit has a judge
cards.body: Before entering production, every fruit passes through hands that know what they're looking for. If it doesn't meet the standard, it doesn't get in. That simple, that honest.

cards.title: Artisanal by conviction
cards.body: We're not an industrial plant. Every orange passes through hands that know what they're doing — no shortcuts, no machines that lose the soul of the fruit. That's what you taste.

cards.title: Freshness doesn't wait
cards.body: From orange to jar in minutes. No pasteurizing, no preservatives — the juice reaches you with everything the fruit had when it left the field.

cards.title: Behind every bottle
cards.body: We're a couple who bet on natural when nobody was asking for it. Every delivery carries our name — and that drives us to always give our best.

cta.title: Want to try our products?
cta.text: Contact us and discover why we are the favorite choice of so many businesses.
